# 🚀 Build Any App with AI

> **Learn to build production-ready web applications using Claude Code, Cursor, Supabase, Vercel, and GitHub - from zero to deployed in 21 days**

---

## ✨ What This Guide Teaches You

By the end of this training, you'll be able to:

- ✅ Build **full-stack web applications** without traditional coding
- ✅ Use **AI pair programming** (Cursor + Claude) to 10x your productivity
- ✅ Deploy **production-ready apps** that scale to thousands of users
- ✅ Implement **authentication, databases, and payments** like a pro
- ✅ Ship **in weeks, not months** - validated methodology, proven results

---

## 🎯 The Promise

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Time to Launch** | 21 days from idea to production |
| **Monthly Cost** | $20-70 (mostly free tiers) |
| **Prerequisites** | Zero coding experience required |
| **Scalability** | Production-ready from day one |

---

## 🛠 The Stack (Your New Superpowers)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🤖 DEVELOPMENT (Cursor + Claude Code)       │
│  → AI writes code from your prompts         │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘
                 ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ⚛️  FRONTEND (Next.js + React)             │
│  → Pages, Components, UI (Shadcn/ui)        │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘
                 ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🗄️  BACKEND (Supabase)                     │
│  → PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Realtime   │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘
                 ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  📦 VERSION CONTROL (GitHub)                │
│  → Track changes + Backup + Collaboration   │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────┘
                 ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🚀 HOSTING (Vercel)                        │
│  → Global CDN + Auto-deploy + Serverless    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 📚 What's Inside This Guide

### Phase 1: Foundation (Days 0-4)
- Install all tools and create accounts
- Understand the AI-powered development methodology
- Master Cursor's AI features (Composer, Chat, Inline)

### Phase 2: Core Build (Days 5-14)
- Set up authentication (Google OAuth, email/password)
- Design and implement your database schema
- Build your app's core features with AI assistance
- Create beautiful, responsive UI with Shadcn/ui

### Phase 3: Launch (Days 15-21)
- Add subscription billing (Stripe)
- Security hardening and testing
- Deploy to production (Vercel)
- Monitoring and error tracking

---

## 💡 The Methodology

This guide teaches you a **proven system** that works for any web app:

> **Strategy First. Prompt Second. Results Always.**

1. **Strategy** - Plan the feature before coding
2. **Prompt** - Write structured AI prompts (CONTEXT → TASK → CONSTRAINTS → ACCEPTANCE)
3. **Results** - Validate output, test, deploy

You're not learning to code - you're learning to **architect and direct AI** to build for you.

---

## 📱 Reference Project: MeetOrbi

Throughout this guide, we use **MeetOrbi** as our live example:

**What it is:** AI Chief of Staff for Google Workspace  
**What it does:** Manages Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and Tasks using Claude AI  
**Tech stack:** Next.js + Supabase + LangGraph + Google APIs  
**Deployment:** Vercel with custom domain  

**You'll learn:**
- Complex OAuth flows (multi-scope Google)
- AI agent orchestration (LangGraph)
- Secure key management (BYOK with encryption)
- Real-time updates (Supabase Realtime)
- Subscription billing (Stripe)

---

## 🎓 Who This Is For

### ✅ Perfect If You Are:
- Non-technical founder with a SaaS idea
- Product manager wanting to build prototypes
- Designer learning to code
- Indie hacker/solopreneur
- Student learning modern web dev
- Developer wanting to 10x productivity

### ❌ Not Right If You:
- Want to learn "real" coding fundamentals
- Need native mobile apps (this is web-first)
- Have zero computer skills
- Aren't willing to read docs when stuck

---

## 💰 Total Cost Breakdown

| Service | Free Tier | Paid Tier | When to Upgrade |
|---------|-----------|-----------|-----------------|
| **Cursor** | - | $20/mo | Required from day 1 |
| **Claude Code** | - | ~$5-20/mo | Optional, for complex tasks |
| **Supabase** | 500MB DB | $25/mo | >500MB or >100K users |
| **Vercel** | 100GB bandwidth | $20/mo | Custom domain needed |
| **GitHub** | Unlimited | Free | Never (free forever) |
| **TOTAL** | **$20/mo** | **$65-85/mo** | **At scale** |

**Strategy:** Start at $20/mo, scale to $65-85/mo only when you have paying customers.

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Option A: Follow the MeetOrbi Build (Recommended)
Complete the reference project step-by-step:

1. Read [Quick Start Guide](START_HERE.md) - understand the 21-day roadmap
2. Complete [Environment Setup](deployment_commands.md) - install tools
3. Follow [Cursor Prompts 1-5](cursor_prompts_1_to_5.md) - build core features
4. Deploy using [Deployment Guide](deployment_commands.md)

### Option B: Build Your Own App
Use the methodology to build your idea:

1. Read [The Methodology](build_MO.md#methodology) - understand principles
2. Study [Architecture Patterns](build_MO.md#architecture)
3. Adapt [Cursor Prompts](cursor_prompts_1_to_5.md) to your needs
4. Reference [Design System](design.md) for UI

---

## 📖 How to Use This Guide

### Two Learning Paths:

**1. Sequential (Beginner-Friendly)**
- Start with "Getting Started" in the sidebar
- Read each section in order
- Complete exercises and validations
- Build confidence progressively

**2. Reference (Experienced)**
- Jump to specific topics via search
- Use as troubleshooting resource
- Reference design system and prompts
- Copy-paste code examples

### Each Section Includes:
- 💡 **Concepts** - What you need to understand
- 💻 **Commands** - Copy-paste terminal commands
- ✍️ **Prompts** - Proven Cursor prompts that work
- ✅ **Validation** - How to verify it works
- 🔍 **Troubleshooting** - Common issues and fixes

---

## 🎯 Success Metrics (30 Days Post-Launch)

Your app is successful if you achieve:

- ✅ **Deployed to production** with custom domain
- ✅ **10+ active users** using your app daily
- ✅ **$4/user/mo cost** or lower (if applicable)
- ✅ **<5% error rate** in monitoring
- ✅ **4.5+ star feedback** from beta users

---

## 🔥 What Makes This Different

**Other Tutorials:**
- Teach syntax → frameworks → build toy examples
- Take 6-12 months to build first real app
- Outdated the moment they're published

**This Guide:**
- Teach methodology → AI prompting → build production apps
- Ship your first app in 21 days
- AI handles syntax, you handle strategy
- Timeless principles (works with any AI tool)
